channel.title: Publications on Zachary Katz
channel.description: Recent content in Publications on Zachary Katz

item.title: Seismic Monitoring near Ithaca, New York, Reveals Nonuniform Distribution of Microseismicity in an Intraplate Region
item.description: @article{10.1785/0220240158, author = {Katz, Zachary S. and Abers, Geoffery A. and Yang, Yucheng and Ferris, Aaron and Jordan, Teresa E. and Pritchard, Matthew E. and Fulton, Patrick M. and Gustafson, Olaf}, title = {Seismic Monitoring near Ithaca, New York, Reveals Nonuniform Distribution of Microseismicity in an Intraplate Region}, journal = {Seismological Research Letters}, volume = {95}, number = {5}, pages = {3042-3054}, year = {2024}, month = {07}, abstract = {Cornell University intends to use a deep direct‐use geothermal system to heat its Ithaca, New York, campus.

item.title: Seismic Monitoring near Ithaca, New York, Reveals Nonuniform Distribution of Microseismicity in an Intraplate Region
item.description: @article{10.1785/0220240158, author = {Katz, Zachary S. and Abers, Geoffery A. and Yang, Yucheng and Ferris, Aaron and Jordan, Teresa E. and Pritchard, Matthew E. and Fulton, Patrick M. and Gustafson, Olaf}, title = {Seismic Monitoring near Ithaca, New York, Reveals Nonuniform Distribution of Microseismicity in an Intraplate Region}, journal = {Seismological Research Letters}, volume = {95}, number = {5}, pages = {3042-3054}, year = {2024}, month = {07}, abstract = {Cornell University intends to use a deep direct‐use geothermal system to heat its Ithaca, New York, campus.
